"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "### Impact

When following cross-origin redirects for requests made using urllib3’s high-level APIs, such as `urllib3.request()`, `PoolManager.request()`, and `ProxyManager.request()`, sensitive headers — `Authorization`, `Cookie`, and `Proxy-Authorization` (defined in `Retry.DEFAULT_REMOVE_HEADERS_ON_REDIRECT`) — are stripped by default, as expected.

However, cross-origin redirects followed from the low-level API via `ProxyManager.connection_from_url().urlopen(..., assert_same_host=False)` still forward these sensitive headers.

### Affected usage

Applications and libraries using urllib3 versions earlier than 2.7.0 may be affected if they allow cross-origin redirects while making requests through `HTTPConnection.urlopen()` instances created via `ProxyManager.connection_from_url()`.

### Remediation

Upgrade to urllib3 version 2.7.0 or later, in which sensitive headers are stripped from redirects followed by `HTTPConnection`.

If upgrading is not immediately possible, avoid using this low-level redirect flow for cross-origin redirects. If appropriate for your use case, switch to `ProxyManager.request()`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00527, "percentile": 0.40595}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qccp-gfcp-xxvc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T14:51:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qccp-gfcp-xxvc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qccp-gfcp-xxvc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44431"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-13T16:16:57Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T14:51:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3/security/advisories/GHSA-qccp-gfcp-xxvc", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44431", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qccp-gfcp-xxvc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/urllib3/urllib3/security-advisories/GHSA-qccp-gfcp-xxvc", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3", "summary": "urllib3: Sensitive headers forwarded across origins in proxied low-level redirects", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:35:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qccp-gfcp-xxvc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.7.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "urllib3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.23, < 2.7.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: urllib3: Sensitive headers forwarded across origins in proxied low-level redirects
